title: solar-flare-utac v0.1.0: UTAC Analysis of Solar Flare Criticality and Magnetospheric Dynamics
description: solar-flare-utac v0.1.0 applies UTAC (Universal Threshold Activation Criticality) to solar flare energy distributions and inter-flare waiting-time series from GOES/RHESSI catalogues. The UTAC-Logistic ODE recovers power-law scaling and critical magnetic energy release thresholds, demonstrating that solar activity exhibits self-organized criticality consistent with the UTAC framework. CREP metrics characterise coherence and emergence in magnetospheric dynamics. Part of the GenesisAeon UTAC application suite (genesis-os). Dual-licensed: GPLv3-or-later (code) + CC BY 4.0 (documentation).
